name: Signal87 Dark Dashboard App Theme
directive: LOCKED. Do not modify the logged-in app visual theme unless the user explicitly requests a theme change.
forbiddenWithoutDirective: Reverting .signal-app to a light/white Notion-style palette
Replacing green primary (--s87-green / --primary: 92 82% 75%) with indigo or purple
Moving logged-in app tokens from .signal-app into :root or .dark
Removing theme verification from the build pipeline
Editing home.tsx .s87-landing styles as part of an app theme task
